creator: ianjhart@ntlworld.com
text:
Advansys 5140 (ISA/PNP) SCSI card causes panic on booting.
	Requires a specific BIOS and BIOS settings to trigger,
	but probably applies to all ISA cards using this driver.

Fix: 

Update /usr/src/sys/dev/advansys/advansys.c to r1.20
How-To-Repeat: 	Put the card in, turn the machine on.
